extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Studio Web Agent Builder with the agent configuration page open. On the left, the agent already has a user prompt, a Tools section with an Add tool button, and a configured context named "ServiceNow Incidents Ca...". On the right, the Choose tool side panel is open, and the RPA workflow option in the Toolbox is highlighted, indicating the user is about to add an imported automation as a tool.
step_instructions: Click on Add tool in the Tools section.
In the Choose tool panel, select RPA workflow from the Toolbox.
